app_release_notes: v0.16.46 - Live score tuning. Results > Charts now lets you tune the composite weights right in the app (number boxes + Re-score + Reset to defaults) for the powder ladder and seating depth, with a plain-English explainer of the defaults. Scoring correction: the Velocity weight now scores your velocity flat-spot - how steady your velocity stays across the ladder, using your chronograph speeds - instead of group size; mean radius remains the scored group metric. Also fixes the in-app Pocket Card preview on Mac.

mac.app_release_notes: v0.16.46 - Live score tuning on Results > Charts (number boxes + Re-score + Reset, powder ladder + seating depth, with a defaults explainer). Scoring correction: the Velocity weight now scores your velocity flat-spot (steady velocity across the ladder, from your chronograph speeds) instead of group size; mean radius stays the scored group metric. Fixes the in-app Pocket Card preview on Mac.

windows.app_release_notes: v0.16.46 - The 'How did we land on these weights?' explainer now notes that Loadscope's scoring is built on established ballistics and precision-statistics principles and is checked by an automated test suite on every release.
